name: Dupre
question:
Dost thou try to
live honorably?
yes:
It is a constant
quest. Honor is
like finely
polished armour.
Without constant
care, it will
soon tarnish!

name: Virgil
answer2:
Nightshade may
be found only
near lat-J'F"
long-C'O" only on
the darkest of
nights!
question: 'tis it thine?

name: Publius
job:
I drink a toast
to honor!
answer1:
What is left
when honor is
lost?
answer2:
Right, take
honor from me
and my life is
done!
question:
Dost thou strive
to live an
honorable life?

name: Skitle
answer2:
I have seen the
purple stone
used in the
altars of
truth and
courage!
question: Ever been there?
no:
It holds items
thou shalt need.

name: Sailor Sam
job:
I sail the
the seas of
Britannia!
answer2:
Go to the pub in
Jhelom and ask
of sextants.
question:
Is it thy
specialty?
no:
Thou must
not own a
sextant, eh?

name: Aristotle
answer1:
Dignity
consists not
in possessing
honors, but in
deserving them.
answer2:
Honor no one,
but honor
itself!
question:
Art thou
honorable at all
times?

name: Terrin
answer1:
A big one, with
long, pointy
horns!
answer2:
It is buried in
the southwest
corner of towne.
question: Is it gone yet?
yes:
Whew, I thought
it would get me!

name: Rigmore
answer1:
Yes, welcome to
Trinsic city of
honor!
answer2:
Wisdom on the
virtue of honor
is found
throughout this
towne.
question:
Dost thou seek
this wisdom?

name: Winthrop
answer2:
There is a small
child who knew
named... Terrin.
question:
Dost thou
know him?
no:
Find him and ask
of the rune!

name: Swindrik
answer2:
Ask at the
Folley tavern
of mandrake.
question:
Dost thou cast
spells of great
power?
yes:
What is the
most powerful
reagent?
no:
Dost thou know
their main
ingredient?

name: Kline
job:
I seek entry to
the shrine of
honor!
answer2:
A man named
Winthrop knows
of the rune!
question:
Know ye the two
requirements to
enter and use
the shrine?

name: Lexington
answer2:
The solving of
quests brings ye
honor!
question:
Strive ye
for honor?
yes:
Then solve
quests but
attack not
non-evil
creatures, and
get not
others gold!

name: Dergin
job:
I seek a place
to rest.
answer1:
I have quested
long and hard.
answer2:
I seek
enlightenment
at the shrine of
honor!
question:
Art thou
enlightened
in honor?
no:
The shrine lies
to the south and
west beyond the
swamps!

name: a guard
question:
Dost thou strive
to bring honor
upon the peers?
yes:
Dupre, the
leader of our
towne, joins
many honorable
quests!

name: Quix
answer2:
About the purple
stone of honor!
question:
Dost thou have
the purple
stone?
no:
Seek it for it
is very useful!
